comments.body:
Hi Carl,

Greetings from PluginHive!

Upon checking, I can see that the shipping rate rule is currently disabled, which is why it is not appearing at checkout. Please enable the rule and try again.

Additionally, I’d like to assist you further—could you please confirm whether the specific service you are looking for is activated on your Royal Mail account?

We also recommend creating a test order in Royal Mail with the same shipment details to verify if the rates are being returned as expected.
Please refer to the attached screenshot for your reference.

Feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/kqwX8O4y7Ry0IwlwVW6d1O9L0/?name=Screenshot+2026-03-20+at+7.26.36%E2%80%AFPM.png)
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Carl,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
Upon checking, I can see that the shipping rate rule is currently disabled, which is why it is not appearing at checkout. Please enable the rule and try again.
 
Additionally, I’d like to assist you further—could you please confirm whether the specific service you are looking for is activated on your Royal Mail account?
 
We also recommend creating a test order in Royal Mail with the same shipment details to verify if the rates are being returned as expected.
Please refer to the attached screenshot for your reference.
 
Feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.
 

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Manohar,



Thank you for sending this over, so the issue with special delivery isn’t relating to plugin hive but easypost and Royal Mail? If you can please confirm on that then I will go back to easypost and get this resolved.



With regards to the free shipping that is helpful however it’s not what I was requesting, I need to be able to discount the shipping rates that I have currently setup to be free if the cart value is over £100.



Also thank you for coming back to me about editing the packing slip and the picklist however I’m already aware of how to edit them. My query is around the available variables I can use on them. For example I would like to display lineItem vendor in my packing slip, along with customer information ie shipping details.



If you can help with this I would appreciate it.



Kind regards

Billy

comments.body:
Hello Billy,

Thank you for your reply.

Yes, you may need to contact EasyPost to understand why the special service is not available. You can share the attached ZIP file with them for further investigation.

If your requirement is to display Royal Mail services as free or to offer a discount based on the order price, you can use the **“Adjust Shipment Price”** option with the **subtraction** (please refer to the attached screenshot).

Additionally, could you please share a sample packing slip with the changes you are looking for? It would also be helpful if you could provide more details on where this information is set and how you would like it to appear, so we can review and assist you accordingly.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/1ltVNVqJFisBS3R98OqMR7kz4/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body:
Hello Billy,
 
Thank you for your reply.
 
Yes, you may need to contact EasyPost to understand why the special service is not available. You can share the attached ZIP file with them for further investigation.
 
If your requirement is to display Royal Mail services as free or to offer a discount based on the order price, you can use the “Adjust Shipment Price” option with the subtraction (please refer to the attached screenshot).
 
Additionally, could you please share a sample packing slip with the changes you are looking for? It would also be helpful if you could provide more details on where this information is set and how you would like it to appear, so we can review and assist you accordingly.
 
Looking forward to hearing from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Billy,

Regarding your query—EasyPost allows label generation only for orders with the current or future shipment date. Since the order was placed yesterday, the system was passing the previous date as the shipment date, which caused the label generation to fail.

To resolve this, you'll need to reprocess the affected orders before generating the labels. Here's how you can do it:
Select the orders -> Change their status to **Initial ->** Click **Prepare Shipment ->** Then proceed to **Generate Label**

Reprocessing will update the shipment date, allowing the labels to be generated successfully.

Please take a look, and feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Billy,
 
Regarding your query—EasyPost allows label generation only for orders with the current or future shipment date. Since the order was placed yesterday, the system was passing the previous date as the shipment date, which caused the label generation to fail.
 
To resolve this, you'll need to reprocess the affected orders before generating the labels. Here's how you can do it:
Select the orders -> Change their status to Initial -> Click Prepare Shipment -> Then proceed to Generate Label
 
Reprocessing will update the shipment date, allowing the labels to be generated successfully.
 
Please take a look, and feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.
 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Billy,

Reproceesing the orders will consider the latest updated details for the label generation.

If you would want to provide signature option for the label generated orders, Navigate to App Settings -> Automation -> Setup -> Edit Rule -> Under Action Details, select the Delivery Confirmation  and enable the suitable Signature option -> Update Rule.

Once updated, generate label for a new order and check the working.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/MYWwguag3MiASP2DDyX5IV0au/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Billy,
 
Reproceesing the orders will consider the latest updated details for the label generation. 
 
If you would want to provide signature option for the label generated orders, Navigate to App Settings -> Automation -> Setup -> Edit Rule -> Under Action Details, select the Delivery Confirmation  and enable the suitable Signature option -> Update Rule. 
 
Once updated, generate label for a new order and check the working.
 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.plain_body:
Hi Sagar,

Sorry for poor response, i have unfortunately ran into another issue we aren't seeing the same "Carrier Services" that easy post are.



we are currently seeing: Royal MailV3 RoyalMail48ParcelsDailyRate and Royal MailV3 RoyalMail24ParcelsDailyRate

But easy post have: RoyalMail48ParcelDailyRateService and RoyalMail24ParcelDailyRateService



They have told me "This would need to be adjusted on the PluginHive side as this is a known service within our docs(https://docs.easypost.com/docs/shipments/rates#service-levels under RoyalMailV3)"

Hope you can help with this.

Kind regards
Billy

comments.body:

Good day!

Do you want to use the services RoyalMail48ParcelDailyRateService and RoyalMail24ParcelDailyRateService through the app?

Do let us know so we can check with our team accordingly.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

L3 - Requirement to include two RoyalMail V3 services in the app.

Following are services available in EasyPost RM V3 but not available in the app. Please include them in the app and let us know once done.

RoyalMail48ParcelDailyRateService
RoyalMail24ParcelDailyRateService

Here is the link to verify the availability of the services in the EasyPost - https://docs.easypost.com/docs/shipments/rates#service-levels

comments.body:
Hello Billy,

Thank you for your patience.

I would like to share an update on your requests.

The service **RoyalMail24ParcelDailyRateService** is already available in the app for your use.

The enhancement for the service **RoyalMail48ParcelDailyRateService** in the app will be made available in the upcoming release so that you can use it for your requirements.

We will update you as soon as the enhancement is made available.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
